S.FORM: I 1959 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 31 a romi'ad masofoc ci Baron Waqa , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Nauru anini i ci Baron Waqa, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 11 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô

S.FORM: I 1959 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 31 a romi'ad masofoc ci Baron Waqa , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Nauru anini i ci Baron Waqa, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 11 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
